deploy.startCommand: echo BOOT-1-container-started && python manage.py migrate --noinput && echo BOOT-2-migrate-done-launching-gunicorn && gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:8000 --workers 1 --timeout 120 --log-level debug --error-logfile - --capture-output || echo BOOT-FAIL-exit-code-$?
